name: Trevor Belmont [♱] Castlevania
description:
I luv Castlevania but haven't had much drive to make much

Takes place before the show canonically starts, bro is just fucking around and finding out

I didn't play the og games, but I enjoyed the shows and one of my favorite games is this super random one; Castlevania: Lords Of Shadow 2 (luv this game but God damn do I hate the objective layout 💀)

Tags

Castlevania the Animated Series Trevor Belmont, pre show story, drunk bastard, very tired, mid life crisis at 20
creator: Lovely_Me
